title: Main menu settings and language selection
summary: Add the default player start/settings surface with New/Continue/Settings and language selection.
acceptance: Default launch includes player-facing main/start surface rather than diagnostics harness
Provides New Game, Continue, Settings and language selection affordances
Manual language selection updates visible UI and persists in the intended scope
Does not execute release/store/signing or change simulation authority
Covered by Web and desktop E2E

history.details: Created by WM-0111 M8 UI/i18n scope amendment DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.

forbiddenPaths: save schema changes unless explicitly scoped by existing persistence APIs
